evals.name: users-schema
evals.prompt: Design a PostgreSQL schema for the users table with auth fields.
evals.expected_output: SQL CREATE TABLE statement with id (UUID), email (unique), hashed_password, created_at, updated_at, and is_active columns.

evals.name: migration-script
evals.prompt: Write an Alembic migration to add a role column to the users table.
evals.expected_output: Alembic migration file with upgrade() adding a VARCHAR role column with a default of 'user', and downgrade() removing it.

evals.name: seed-data
evals.prompt: Create a seed script that inserts 5 sample job positions into the positions table.
evals.expected_output: Python seed script using SQLAlchemy session to insert typed Position model instances with realistic sample data.

evals.name: index-design
evals.prompt: Define indexes for the positions table to optimize search by company and status.
evals.expected_output: SQL CREATE INDEX statements covering company_id and status columns, with notes on index type selection.
